biography: Isabél Martins Zuaa Mutange (Lisbon, April 5, 1987), is a Portuguese actress and performer, winner of the Guarani Brazilian Cinema Award (2017), in the Revelation category, for her role in the film Joaquim, by Marcelo Gomes. In 2020, she was distinguished by the Gramado Film Festival with two Best Actress awards, for her performance in the feature film Um Animal Amarelo by Filipe Bragança and in the short film Deserto Estrangeiro, by Davi Pretto.
name: Isabél Zuaa
